tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 290035 Ink recirculation too long not possible.

abstract.p: The level sensor of a printhead has three levels: empty, full and overfilled.
When the ink level of the white printhead is overfilled recirculation may not start because ink dosing to the printhead (and thus a malfunctioning 3-way valve, 02Y5) cannot be detected anymore.
Recirculation will be postponed. This warning is reported when ink recirculation has been postponed too long.
Check the 3-way valve as per SDS 02-6-010 White Ink Recirculation (Special Test). Replace the 3-way valve if needed.
Replace the printhead if this warning keeps occurring (after checking/replacing the 3-way valve). No action required on a single occurrence.
